title: Your evidence is behind your learning
body: You have completed lessons but have limited project evidence. Convert the next concept into a small deliverable.

title: You may be ready for a stage assessment
body: Your stage lessons are complete. Validate your knowledge and unlock the next professional stage.

title: Practise professional communication
body: Your technical progress is stronger than your communication evidence. Record a stand-up or stakeholder brief.

title: Your weekly review is due
body: Reflect on progress, blockers and next actions before starting another week.
